name: TOTALLY BASKETBALL
summary: TOTALLY BASKETBALL lets you play the full sport of Basketball in VR!  Jump for the Tip-Off! Shoot free throws! Steal the ball but don't get a Foul! This game gives you the awesome ability to control your 2 teammates when playing full court 3v3 matches. Use your buttons to move your teammates to better positions or to pass you the ball when you've got a good shot!
